content.text:
{"draft_subject":"Re: Proposal - 2-week AI Sprint for Thistle & Finch Accountants","draft_body":"Hi Rachel,

Just checking in on the AI sprint proposal I sent over last week. I know automating the management-accounts pack is a big decision - happy to jump on a quick call if it would help to talk through the approach.

Let me know if you have any questions or if there's anything I can clarify.

Cheers,
Allan"}

expected.draft_subject: Re: Proposal - 2-week AI Sprint for Thistle & Finch Accountants
expected.draft_body:
Hi Rachel,

Just checking in on the AI sprint proposal I sent over last week. I know automating the management-accounts pack is a big decision - happy to jump on a quick call if it would help to talk through the approach.

Let me know if you have any questions or if there's anything I can clarify.

Cheers,
Allan
